1.judgment: Supreme success through perseverance. The creative force moves ceaselessly, generating all things. Strength upon strength.
1.image: Heaven moves with vigour. The wise one never ceases to strengthen themselves.

2.judgment: Devotion brings supreme success. The mare's perseverance is favourable. Yield and support; find strength in gentleness.
2.image: The earth's condition is receptive devotion. The wise one sustains all things with generous virtue.

3.judgment: Great success if you persevere. Do not act alone; seek helpers. Like a seedling pushing through frozen ground.
3.image: Clouds and thunder gather. The wise one brings order out of confusion.

4.judgment: Not I seek the young fool — the young fool seeks me. Sincerity is needed. Accept instruction with humility.
4.image: A spring emerges at the foot of the mountain. The wise one cultivates character through decisive action.

5.judgment: Sincerity brings brilliant success. Cross the great water when the time is right. Nourish yourself while waiting.
5.image: Clouds rise to heaven. The wise one eats, drinks, and is joyful while waiting.

6.judgment: Sincerity is obstructed. Pause halfway — do not push to the end. Seek a wise mediator.
6.image: Heaven and water move in opposite directions. The wise one considers the beginning before undertaking affairs.

7.judgment: The army needs discipline and an experienced leader. Correct conduct brings good fortune. Strength must serve righteousness.
7.image: Water stored within the earth. The wise one is generous to the people and gathers multitudes.

8.judgment: Good fortune. Examine yourself — are you truly devoted? Latecomers meet misfortune. Unity requires a centre.
8.image: Water upon the earth flows together. The ancient kings established myriad states and maintained close ties with the feudal lords.

9.judgment: Success through gentle restraint. Dense clouds but no rain yet from the western regions. Patience — influence grows slowly.
9.image: Wind blows across heaven. The wise one refines the outward expression of their virtue.

10.judgment: Tread upon the tiger's tail with care. If one does not provoke the tiger, success follows. Propriety protects.
10.image: Heaven above, the lake below. The wise one distinguishes high and low and settles the hearts of the people.

11.judgment: The small departs, the great approaches. Good fortune and success. Heaven and earth unite — all things flourish.
11.image: Heaven and earth unite. The ruler channels the way of heaven and earth to aid the people.

12.judgment: Standstill — the way of inferior people prevails. Perseverance of the wise one. The great departs, the small approaches.
12.image: Heaven and earth do not unite. The wise one withdraws into their inner worth to avoid difficulties.

13.judgment: Fellowship in the open brings success. Cross the great water. Strength through shared purpose.
13.image: Heaven together with fire. The wise one organises clans and distinguishes things.

14.judgment: Supreme success. Fire in the heavens shines far. Abundance flows to the magnanimous.
14.image: Fire above heaven. The wise one curbs evil and promotes good, in accordance with the will of heaven.

15.judgment: Modesty brings success to completion. The mountain concealed within the earth. The humble are exalted.
15.image: The mountain rests within the earth. The wise one reduces what is excessive and increases what is lacking.

16.judgment: It furthers one to appoint helpers and set armies marching. Action taken with enthusiasm and correct timing.
16.image: Thunder emerges from the earth with force. The ancient kings made music to honour virtue.

17.judgment: Supreme success through perseverance. No blame. Adapt to the time — know when to lead and when to follow.
17.image: Thunder within the lake. The wise one goes indoors at nightfall to rest.

18.name_en: Work on What Has Been Spoiled
18.judgment: Great success. Cross the great water. Consider three days before and three days after the turning point.
18.image: Wind blows at the foot of the mountain. The wise one stirs up the people and nourishes their virtue.

19.judgment: Great success through perseverance. But when the eighth month comes, there will be misfortune. Use this time well.
19.image: The earth above the lake. The wise one is inexhaustible in teaching and boundless in protecting the people.

20.judgment: The ablution has been made but not yet the offering. Look within with sincerity. Observe the deeper pattern.
20.image: Wind blows over the earth. The ancient kings visited all regions, observed the people, and gave instruction.

21.judgment: Success. Use legal proceedings. An obstacle must be forcefully removed. Justice applied with clarity.
21.image: Thunder and lightning. The ancient kings made penalties clear and enforced the laws.

22.judgment: Success in small matters. Grace is the beauty of form, not substance. Adorn but do not depend on adornment.
22.image: Fire at the foot of the mountain. The wise one clarifies governance but dares not judge with severity alone.

23.judgment: Not favourable to go anywhere. The inferior erodes the foundation. Wait — the cycle will turn. Strengthen what remains.
23.image: The mountain rests upon the earth. Those above secure their position by being generous to those below.

24.judgment: Success. Coming and going without error. The return of the light after darkness. The turning point has arrived.
24.image: Thunder within the earth. The ancient kings closed the passes at the solstice and let all rest.

25.judgment: Supreme success through perseverance. Act without ulterior motive. Unexpected misfortune strikes the reckless.
25.image: Thunder rolls beneath heaven. All things receive their true nature. The ancient kings nourished all beings in accordance with the season.

26.judgment: Perseverance brings reward. Do not eat at home — go forth and serve. Cross the great water. Accumulate wisdom.
26.image: Heaven within the mountain. The wise one studies the words and deeds of the past to accumulate virtue.

27.judgment: Perseverance brings good fortune. Consider what nourishes — both body and mind. Watch the mouth: what goes in and out.
27.image: Thunder at the foot of the mountain. The wise one is careful of speech and temperate in eating and drinking.

28.judgment: The ridgepole sags. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. Success through extraordinary measures.
28.image: The lake submerges the trees. The wise one stands alone without fear and withdraws from the world without regret.

29.judgment: Sincerity in the heart brings success. Danger upon danger. Flow like water — maintain your inner truth through peril.
29.image: Water flows ceaselessly. The wise one walks in lasting virtue and practises the art of teaching.

30.judgment: Perseverance brings success. Tend the cow — cultivate docility. Fire depends on fuel; clarity depends on what sustains it.
30.image: Brightness rises twice. The great one illuminates the four directions with continuing brightness.

31.judgment: Success. Perseverance furthers. Taking a maiden to wife brings good fortune. Mutual attraction and resonance.
31.image: The lake upon the mountain. The wise one receives others with openness.

32.judgment: Success without blame. Perseverance furthers. Movement within constancy. The way endures through all change.
32.image: Thunder and wind strengthen each other. The wise one stands firm and does not change direction.

33.judgment: Success in small matters. Strategic withdrawal at the right moment. The wise one retreats with dignity.
33.image: Mountain under heaven. The wise one keeps the inferior at a distance — not angrily but with reserve.

34.judgment: Perseverance furthers. Power must be tempered with righteousness, or it becomes mere force.
34.image: Thunder above heaven. The wise one does not tread on paths that are not in accord with established order.

35.judgment: The powerful prince is honoured with horses. Advancement and recognition come naturally when virtue shines.
35.image: The sun rises above the earth. The wise one brightens their own radiant virtue.

36.judgment: Perseverance in adversity furthers. Conceal your brightness in difficult times. Endure with inner strength.
36.image: The sun sinks into the earth. The wise one veils their light in dealing with the masses, yet still shines.

37.judgment: The woman's perseverance furthers. Order begins at home. Proper relationships form the foundation of all society.
37.image: Wind comes from fire. The wise one speaks with substance and acts with constancy.

38.judgment: Good fortune in small matters. When people are estranged, progress comes through gentle, indirect means.
38.image: Fire above, the lake below. The wise one recognises differences while maintaining commonality.

39.judgment: The southwest furthers. The northeast does not. Seek counsel. Retreat to gather strength before advancing.
39.image: Water upon the mountain. The wise one turns inward and examines their own character.

40.judgment: The southwest furthers. Where there is nothing more to do, return brings good fortune. Act swiftly when the way opens.
40.image: Thunder and rain arise. The wise one pardons mistakes and forgives transgressions.

41.judgment: Sincerity brings supreme good fortune. Simplify and reduce excess. Sacrifice below to enrich above.
41.image: The lake at the foot of the mountain. The wise one controls anger and restrains desire.

42.judgment: It furthers one to cross the great water. The time is ripe for undertakings. Give generously and receive naturally.
42.image: Wind and thunder increase each other. The wise one improves when seeing good, and corrects faults.

43.judgment: Resolutely make the matter known. Speak truth even in danger. Do not resort to arms. Press forward with right purpose.
43.image: The lake rises to heaven. The wise one distributes blessings to those below and avoids dwelling on their own virtue.

44.judgment: The maiden is powerful — do not marry her. A force appears unexpectedly. Exercise caution with what approaches.
44.image: Wind beneath heaven. The prince sends forth commands to the four quarters.

45.judgment: Success. The king approaches the temple. Gathering requires a centre. Great offerings are favourable.
45.image: The lake above the earth. The wise one renews their weapons to meet the unforeseen.

46.judgment: Supreme success. Seek out the great one without anxiety. Steady growth upward. Set forth to the south.
46.image: Wood grows within the earth. The wise one builds up small things into high and great.

47.judgment: Success through perseverance for the great one. No blame. Words are not believed in this time. Endure silently.
47.image: The lake with no water. The wise one stakes their life to follow their will.

48.judgment: The town may change but the well does not. The inexhaustible source. Draw from the depths with a sound vessel.
48.image: Water above wood. The wise one encourages the people and exhorts them to help one another.

49.judgment: Believed in only after completion. Supreme success through perseverance. Regret vanishes. Transform what must be transformed.
49.image: Fire in the lake. The wise one sets the calendar and makes the seasons clear.

50.judgment: Supreme good fortune and success. The sacred vessel transforms the raw into the refined. Nourish the worthy.
50.image: Fire above wood. The wise one consolidates their fate by making their position correct.

51.judgment: Success. Thunder comes — shock and awe. Then laughter. The shock brings fear, but fear brings vigilance.
51.image: Repeated thunder. The wise one examines themselves with fearful apprehension and cultivates their virtue.

52.judgment: Keep the back still so the body is not felt. Walking in the courtyard, one does not see the people. No blame. Stillness brings clarity.
52.image: Mountains standing together. The wise one does not allow their thoughts to go beyond the situation.

53.judgment: The maiden is given in marriage. Good fortune. Gradual progress, step by step, like a wild goose approaching the shore.
53.image: Wood upon the mountain grows gradually. The wise one abides in dignity and virtue to improve the mores.

54.judgment: Undertakings bring misfortune. Nothing that acts to further. Know your place within the situation and act accordingly.
54.image: Thunder above the lake. The wise one understands impermanence through the transitory.

55.judgment: Success. The king attains fullness. Do not be sad — be like the sun at midday. Abundance cannot last forever.
55.image: Thunder and lightning arrive together. The wise one decides lawsuits and carries out punishments.

56.judgment: Success in small matters. Perseverance of the traveller. Be cautious and do not linger. Dignity in transience.
56.image: Fire upon the mountain. The wise one is clear and cautious in imposing penalties and does not delay lawsuits.

57.judgment: Success in small matters. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. Gentle penetration, like wind. Persistent influence.
57.image: Winds following upon each other. The wise one spreads commands and carries out undertakings.

58.judgment: Success. Perseverance furthers. True joy comes from inner strength shared generously with others.
58.image: Lakes resting upon each other. The wise one joins with friends for discussion and practice.

59.judgment: Success. The king approaches the temple. Cross the great water. Dissolve barriers and reunite what has scattered.
59.image: Wind blows over the water. The ancient kings made offerings to the Lord and built temples.

60.judgment: Success. Bitter limitation should not be persevered in. Set boundaries, but not so rigid they become painful.
60.image: Water above the lake. The wise one creates number and measure, and examines the nature of virtue and conduct.

61.judgment: Pigs and fishes — even the lowliest are moved by sincerity. Cross the great water. Inner truth reaches all beings.
61.image: Wind above the lake. The wise one deliberates over criminal cases and delays executions.

62.judgment: Success in small matters. The flying bird brings the message. Ascend not, descend. Great good fortune in humility.
62.image: Thunder upon the mountain. The wise one in conduct exceeds in reverence, in mourning exceeds in sorrow, in expenditure exceeds in thrift.

63.judgment: Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. Good fortune at the beginning, disorder at the end. Remain watchful.
63.image: Water above fire. The wise one considers misfortune in advance and arms against it.

64.judgment: Success. The fox nearly completes the crossing. If its tail gets wet, there is nothing that furthers. Discernment is needed at the threshold.
64.image: Fire above water. The wise one carefully distinguishes things and keeps each in its place.
